freeze.tag.events:Dan5jpZD3FQ.title: Little Treat: Tasting & Treasure Tour
freeze.tag.events:Dan5jpZD3FQ.description: A self-guided passport tour of surprise treats from small businesses across the U-District (Sweetpea's Cakes, Nook & Cranny Books, Fancy Plants, UrbEmSketches, and more). Exact start location sent by email.

freeze.tag.events:DajXPBwmr05.title: One Shot Seattle: Fantasy Scavenger Hunt
freeze.tag.events:DajXPBwmr05.location: Cal Anderson Park, 1635 11th Ave, Seattle, WA 98122
freeze.tag.events:DajXPBwmr05.description: An all-day fantasy-themed photo scavenger hunt. Teams of 2-6 (or solo, matched on-site) compete in challenges starting at Cal Anderson Park and spanning Seattle neighborhoods.

freeze.tag.events:DaQkE67mmid.title: Taskmaster Seattle Live
freeze.tag.events:DaQkE67mmid.description: A live Seattle spoof of the British comedy panel show — audience volunteers compete in silly challenges for the golden duck. Doors 2:30pm.

freeze.tag.events:DadswRukraq.title: Musical Theatre Trivia at Charlie's Queer Books
freeze.tag.events:DadswRukraq.location: Charlie's Queer Books, 465 N 36th St, Seattle, WA 98103
freeze.tag.events:DadswRukraq.description: A dramatic afternoon of musical-theatre trivia hosted by Freeze Tag at Charlie's Queer Books. (Start time not stated in the post.)
